mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM emp WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT emp.*, emp_expr.id AS exprId, emp_expr.emp_id AS exprEmpId, emp_expr.start_date AS exprStartDate, emp_expr.end_date AS exprEndDate, emp_expr.company AS exprCompany, emp_expr.job_title AS exprJobTitle FROM emp LEFT JOIN emp_expr ON emp.id = emp_expr.emp_id WHERE emp.id = #{id}

SELECT (CASE WHEN job = 1 THEN 'HR Specialist' WHEN job = 2 THEN 'Software Engineer' WHEN job = 3 THEN 'Accountant' WHEN job = 4 THEN 'Marketing Specialist' WHEN job = 5 THEN 'Sales Representative' WHEN job = 6 THEN 'Research Scientist' WHEN job = 7 THEN 'Support Specialist' WHEN job = 8 THEN 'Operations Coordinator' WHEN job = 9 THEN 'Legal Counsel' WHEN job = 10 THEN 'Admin Assistant' ELSE 'Other' END) AS job, COUNT(*) AS count FROM emp GROUP BY job ORDER BY count
SELECT IF(gender = 1, 'Male', 'Female') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM emp GROUP BY gender
